articles.title: Tron Founder Shares Plan to Reform Ethereum Foundation and Boost ETH Price to $10K
articles.description: TL;DR Justin Sun proposes halting ETH sales for three years, funding operations through DeFi activities like lending, staking, and stablecoin generation on platforms like Aave. Taxes on Layer 2 projects could generate $5 billion annually for ETH buybacks and reduce its supply, strengthening its position as a deflationary asset. A reorganization of the Ethereum Foundation ... Read more

articles.title: Justin Sun proposes plan to drive Ethereum to $10,000
articles.description: Founder of the Tron blockchain Justin Sun on Wednesday released a plan outlining how he would manage the Ethereum Foundation (EF) and the Ethereum network if he were in charge. Sun said that his plan could drive the price of Ether to $10,000. Sun's plan calls for an immediate three-year halt on all ETH sales by the foundation. articles.title: ZachXBT Recovers $20M for U.S. Government, Sparks Pay Debate
articles.description: Blockchain investigator ZachXBT helped recover $20M in stolen crypto for the U.S. government but received no reward, sparking debate over fair compensation.

articles.title: Trump pardons Ross Ulbricht, fulfilling campaign promise
articles.description: President Donald Trump has granted a presidential pardon to Ross Ulbricht, the founder of the infamous Silk Road marketplace.
